description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & Test on CentOS Latest that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test on ubuntu-20.04 with etcd v3.4.13 in a centos:latest container. Install dependencies, checkout code, install grpc, screenfetch, etcd, and cpprestsdk. Build and test the project with cmake and make, and run various tests with etcd.
